practicals.title: Practical 1: Java Calculator with Error Handling
practicals.desc: Implement a robust Java calculator program that captures user input dynamically, processes mathematical expressions using conditional logic and loops, and handles errors efficiently.

practicals.title: Practical 2: E-commerce Order Processing System
practicals.desc: Develop a Java program for e-commerce order processing using constructors, user input, dynamic cost calculation, discount policies, and invoice generation.

practicals.title: Practical 3: Method Overloading and Math Operations
practicals.desc: Write a Java program to demonstrate method overloading for computing power and absolute values using different data types and Math class methods.

practicals.title: Practical 4: Library Management System
practicals.desc: Implement a library management system to add, issue, and return books while tracking total books using static members and methods.

practicals.title: Practical 5: Array Operations
practicals.desc: Develop a Java program to perform operations on arrays such as display, max/min, sum, average, and searching elements.

practicals.title: Practical 6: Hotel Room Booking System
practicals.desc: Implement a hotel room booking system using two-dimensional arrays to manage room availability and booking operations.

practicals.title: Practical 7: Single Inheritance
practicals.desc: Create a Java program demonstrating single inheritance where a subclass extends a superclass and calls its methods.

practicals.title: Practical 8: Interface and Polymorphism
practicals.desc: Implement interfaces in Java with multiple classes to demonstrate polymorphism.

practicals.title: Practical 9: Abstract Class Implementation
practicals.desc: Create an abstract class with abstract methods and extend it in a subclass providing implementation.

practicals.title: Practical 10: ATM Simulation with Exception Handling
practicals.desc: Develop a Java ATM simulation with functionalities like balance check, withdrawal, and deposit using try-catch-finally blocks.

practicals.title: Practical 11: Online Shopping System
practicals.desc: Create a Java application simulating an online shopping system with cart operations and exception handling.

practicals.title: Practical 12: Multi-threaded Stock Price Monitor
practicals.desc: Develop a Java application using threads to fetch and display stock prices with synchronization and thread control methods.

practicals.title: Practical 13: Multi-threaded Chat System
practicals.desc: Create a multi-threaded chat system where each user is a thread, demonstrating thread lifecycle, priorities, and synchronization.

practicals.title: Practical 14: Employee Database using JDBC
practicals.desc: Develop a Java application to manage employee records using JDBC with CRUD operations and prepared statements.

practicals.title: Practical 15: Student Database using JDBC
practicals.desc: Create a Java application to manage student records with database connectivity and transaction handling.

practicals.title: Practical 16: Weather Data Analysis with JavaFX
practicals.desc: Develop a Java application to read weather data from CSV, perform statistical analysis, and visualize using JavaFX charts.

practicals.title: Practical 17: Patient Data Analysis
practicals.desc: Create a Java application to analyze patient data from CSV and compute statistics using Apache Commons Math with visualization.
